docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED SEP-12-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK, ELISHA CRYSTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A ONE IMPORTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, ELISHA CRYSTAL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-26-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEBTOR PAID $230.25 BY CHECK TO CREDITOR IN COURT TODAY. PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES, DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY $1381.50 BY PAYMENT PLAN, TO THE CREDITOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $230.25 EVERY MONTH STARTING 3/21/13 & LAST PAYMENT WILL BE SEPTEMBER 15, 2013. CREDITOR TO RETURN THE CHAINS BACK TO THE DEBTOR ON THE FINAL PAYMENT DATE. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GUL MOHAMMED--OWNER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. BASED ON THE PROGRESS REPORT OF 3/21/13; IF NO APPEARANCES TODAY 9/26/13, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
